name: Sloppy Joes C/p
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat shortening in a skillet and brown the meat. Discard any excess fat.
2. In a removable liner, combine all ingredients and stir well.
3. Place the liner in the base of the slow cooker.
4. Cover and cook on low for 6-8 hours, or high for 3-4 hours, or auto for 5 hours.
5. Serve over warmed burger buns or noodles.
